title: Klaviyo vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Sendinblue email marketing tools. Pricing, features, and ratings to help you choose the right platform.
intro: Klaviyo and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are two popular email marketing platforms with different strengths. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation, while Sendinblue offers broader CRM capabilities and a more generous free tier. Your choice depends on your business type, budget, and feature priorities.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store and need deep platform integrations with Shopify or WooCommerce
Predictive analytics and advanced segmentation are critical for your marketing strategy
You prioritize automation flows and customer review management
choose_b_if: You need a generous free tier to get started without paying (up to 100,000 subscribers)
Transactional email, SMS, and WhatsApp messaging are priorities for your business
You want an all-in-one CRM suite with built-in chat and customer relationship tools

faq.a: Klaviyo scores higher on G2 (4.6 vs 4.5) and offers superior e-commerce features, making it better for online retailers. However, Sendinblue has a higher Trustpilot rating (4.3 vs 3.8) and provides better value for businesses needing transactional email and SMS at lower costs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper for small businesses, starting at $25/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month for paid plans. Sendinblue also offers a more generous free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers plus 300 free emails daily, versus Klaviyo's 500-subscriber limit.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your contact lists and migrate to another service. Both Klaviyo and Sendinblue typically support CSV exports, though you may lose some historical campaign data or automation workflows during the transition.
